cards.title: Principles Over Techniques
cards.description: Understanding the 'why' behind every movement. A principle applies everywhere — across weapons, ranges, and scenarios. A technique is situational. Master the principle and the techniques follow.

cards.title: Own It
cards.description: Adapt, personalize, make it yours. You don't imitate your teacher forever — you internalize until the art becomes your own expression. The goal is finding your own Lapunti.

cards.title: Traditional Knowledge, Modern Methods
cards.description: Respecting the art's roots and lineage while structuring training for progressive learning, measurable growth, and easier absorption. The old wisdom, delivered through modern methodology.

cards.title: Learn, Test, Refine, Repeat
cards.description: Every skill is drilled, then pressure-tested under resistance, then refined based on what worked and what didn't. The cycle never ends — rank is responsibility, not a finish line. The instructor is always a student.
